vars.description: Add cursor-based pagination to GET /api/chat/sessions
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: cursor opaque base64 of (createdAt,id). R2: limit clamp 1-100. R3: 200 OK with nextCursor. R4: 400 on malformed cursor.
vars.diff_excerpt: + chat.repository.ts: list({cursor, limit}) decode → query orderBy(createdAt DESC, id DESC). + tests: 5 cases (happy + edge: empty page, last page, malformed cursor 400, limit clamp, TZ-stable).

vars.description: Add 5 req/min rate limit to POST /api/auth/login
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: 5 attempts/min/IP. R2: 429 on 6th. R3: counter resets after 60s sliding window.
vars.diff_excerpt: + login-rate-limiter.ts express middleware (Redis INCR + EXPIRE 60). + integration test 6th request → 429.

vars.description: Add audit_logs table with hash-chained integrity
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: id UUID, prev_hash CHAR(64), this_hash CHAR(64), payload JSONB. R2: index on (created_at) DESC.
vars.diff_excerpt: + migrations/1777800000000-AuditLogsHashChain.ts up()/down() symmetric. + tests on rollback parity.

vars.description: MuseumCard component for directory list
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: name, city, image. R2: a11y label per Pressable. R3: design-system tokens only.
vars.diff_excerpt: + features/museum/components/MuseumCard.tsx with Pressable accessibilityLabel + tokens.spacing.md.

vars.description: Add EN translations for chat onboarding keys
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: every FR key has EN counterpart. R2: lint-staged guard for missing keys.
vars.diff_excerpt: + locales/en/chat.json 12 new keys mirroring fr/chat.json. + i18n-key-parity check passes.

vars.description: Fix SQL injection in audit search filter
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: switch raw query to parameterized. R2: regression test attempts injection payload.
vars.diff_excerpt: - queryRunner.query(`SELECT ... WHERE id='${id}'`) + queryRunner.query('SELECT ... WHERE id=$1', [id]). + injection-payload test.

vars.description: Update CLAUDE.md with new ESLint discipline section
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: documents eslint-disable hard rule. R2: examples accurate.
vars.diff_excerpt: + CLAUDE.md +30 lines covering ESLint rule justifications + Approved-by header pattern.

vars.description: Extract date-formatting logic into shared util
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: behavior unchanged. R2: 3 callsites updated. R3: existing tests still pass.
vars.diff_excerpt: + shared/lib/format-iso-date.ts. - 3 inline new Date().toISOString() calls. Tests untouched and pass.

vars.description: Wrap chat.service.invokeLLM with Langfuse span
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: span.name='chat.invokeLLM'. R2: input/output tokens recorded. R3: fail-open on telemetry error.
vars.diff_excerpt: + safeTrace wrapper around invokeLLM call. + try/catch swallows trace errors. + unit test: trace failure does NOT fail chat.

vars.description: Add custom ESLint rule no-undisabled-test-discipline-disable
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: any new eslint-disable in test files needs Justification + Approved-by. R2: rule fixture tests cover happy/sad path.
vars.diff_excerpt: + tools/eslint-plugin-musaium-test-discipline/rules/no-undisabled.ts + tests/no-undisabled.test.ts

vars.description: Fix TZ-sensitive cursor pagination drift across regions
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: server in Europe/Paris must produce same cursor as in UTC. R2: regression test under TZ=Europe/Paris.
vars.diff_excerpt: Migration TIMESTAMPTZ on chat_sessions.createdAt. Cursor codec uses Date.toISOString() instead of getTime(). 41 prior .skip flipped to .it under TZ=Europe/Paris.

vars.description: Remove FEATURE_FLAG_VOICE_MODE after V1 ship
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: flag removed everywhere (config, runtime checks, tests). R2: voice mode now always-on.
vars.diff_excerpt: - 12 callsites of FEATURE_FLAG_VOICE_MODE. - 1 config entry. + assertion in app.config.ts that voice is on. Coverage maintained.

vars.description: Stryker mutation gate ≥80% on auth-chain.ts
vars.spec_excerpt: R1: kill ratio ≥0.8. R2: hot-files JSON registers it.
vars.diff_excerpt: + .stryker-hot-files.json entry. + 4 new mutation-killing tests in tests/integration/auth/audit-chain.mutation.test.ts. Achieved 0.84 kill.

vars.spec_excerpt: R1: zero raw hex outside design-system/. R2: visual diff ≤1px.
vars.diff_excerpt: - 8 #ff... literals across 4 components. + tokens.colors.surfacePrimary etc. Snapshot tests updated.

vars.diff_excerpt: + aria-label on 3 IconButton, + role=table on UsersList wrapper, + aria-live=polite on toast. axe scan now PASS.

vars.diff_excerpt: + wrapIndirectInput(text) helper. + chat.service uses wrapper for retrieved docs. + promptfoo regression case.
